block.text: In the Weather Bureau, you find banks of humming instruments. You also find a printout that explains the flags you saw outside. Apparently a huge storm is due to hit Thalos in a few hours. It will come ashore at the City of Worship, and die away as it rolls over the rest Of the land. If you possess a flask of Potion, turn to 213. If not, Turn to 144.

choice.text: If you possess a flask of Potion.
